variables.input: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == "Sky" | fields json.companyName | dedup json.companyName

fetch bizevents 
| filter json.companyName == $CompanyName
| fields json.journeyType | dedup json.journeyType
fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | filter json.companyName == "Sky" | fields json.stepName | dedup json.stepName

fetch bizevents
| fields json.serviceName, json.companyName, json.journeyType
| summarize count(),by:{json.companyName, json.journeyType, json.serviceName}
| filter json.companyName == $CompanyName 
| filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType)
| dedup json.serviceName
| fields json.serviceName = lower(json.serviceName)
| filter isNotNull(json.serviceName)

smartscapeNodes PROCESS
| lookup [smartscapeNodes SERVICE | fields id, name], sourceField:name, lookupField:name, prefix:"svc."
| lookup [timeseries cpu = avg(dt.process.cpu.usage), by:{dt.smartscape.process}], sourceField:id, lookupField:dt.smartscape.process, fields:{cpu}
| filter isNotNull(cpu)
| fieldsAdd LowerService = lower(name)
| filter in(LowerService, $Service)
| fields id
| dedup id

0.content:
# Build a CFO financial operations dashboard highlighting tota
## Sky | Cancellation Retention Journey | Business Observability
**Data Signals:** 🔧 Services
---

3.title: 📈 Total Journey Volume
3.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType | summarize TotalEvents = count()

4.title: ✅ Journey Success Rate
4.query:
fetch bizevents 
| filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" 
| filter json.companyName == $CompanyName 
| filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType 
| summarize total = count(), successful = countIf(isNull(additionalfields.hasError) or additionalfields.hasError == false) 
| fieldsAdd success_rate = round((toDouble(successful) / toDouble(total)) * 100, decimals:2)

5.title: 💰 Total Revenue
5.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType or $JourneyType == "*" | summarize revenue = sum(additionalfields.orderTotal)

6.title: ❌ Total Errors
6.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType or $JourneyType == "*" | summarize errors = countIf(additionalfields.hasError == true)

7.title: 🎯 Success Rate
7.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | summarize total = count(), successful = countIf(isNull(additionalfields.hasError) or additionalfields.hasError == false) | fieldsAdd rate = round((toDouble(successful) / toDouble(total)) * 100, decimals:1)

8.title: ⚡ Error Rate
8.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | summarize total = count(), errors = countIf(additionalfields.hasError == true) | fieldsAdd rate = round((toDouble(errors) / toDouble(total)) * 100, decimals:1)

10.title: 📊 Journey Step Metrics
10.query:
fetch bizevents 
| filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" 
| filter json.companyName == $CompanyName 
| filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType 
| summarize 
    OrdersInStep = count(), 
    SuccessRate = round((toDouble(countIf(isNull(additionalfields.hasError) or additionalfields.hasError == false)) / toDouble(count())) * 100, decimals:2),
    AvgTimeInStep = avg(additionalfields.processingTime),
    ErrorsInStep = countIf(additionalfields.hasError == true),
    ErrorRate = round((toDouble(countIf(additionalfields.hasError == true)) / toDouble(count())) * 100, decimals:2), 
    by: {json.stepName} 
| sort OrdersInStep desc

11.title: 📈 Volume Over Time
11.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType | makeTimeseries successful = countIf(isNull(additionalfields.hasError) or additionalfields.hasError == false), failed = countIf(additionalfields.hasError == true), bins:30

12.title: 📊 Events by Step
12.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType or $JourneyType == "*" | summarize count = count(), by: {json.stepName} | sort count desc | limit 10

13.title: 🐝 Step Health Overview
13.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | summarize total = count(), successful = countIf(isNull(additionalfields.hasError) or additionalfields.hasError == false), by: {json.stepName} | fieldsAdd success_rate = round((toDouble(successful) / toDouble(total)) * 100, decimals:1) | fields json.stepName, success_rate

15.title: 🎯 Conversion Probability
15.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | summarize value = avg(additionalfields.conversionProbability)

16.title: 💵 Avg Order Value
16.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | summarize value = avg(additionalfields.averageOrderValue)

17.title: 💵 Revenue per Customer
17.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | summarize value = avg(additionalfields.revenuePerCustomer)

18.title: 📊 Profit Margin
18.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | summarize value = avg(additionalfields.profitMargin)

19.title: 🎯 ⏱️ Session Duration
19.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | summarize value = avg(additionalfields.sessionDuration)

20.title: 🎯 💸 Operational Cost
20.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | summarize value = avg(additionalfields.operationalCost)

21.title: 🎯 ✅ Compliance Score
21.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | summarize value = avg(additionalfields.complianceScore)

22.title: 🎯 ⚡ Engagement Score
22.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | summarize value = avg(additionalfields.engagementScore)

24.title: 📊 ⏱️ Session Duration Distribution
24.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | filter isNotNull(additionalfields.sessionDuration) | fields value = additionalfields.sessionDuration

25.title: 📊 ⏱️ Time to Conversion Distribution
25.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | filter isNotNull(additionalfields.timeToConversion) | fields value = additionalfields.timeToConversion

26.title: 🎯 Conversion Rate
26.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | summarize Value = avg(additionalfields.conversionRate), Events = count(), by: {json.stepName} | sort Value desc

27.title: 💰 Transaction Value
27.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | summarize Value = sum(additionalfields.transactionValue), Events = count(), by: {json.stepName} | sort Value desc

28.title: 💰 Order Total
28.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | summarize Value = sum(additionalfields.orderTotal), Events = count(), by: {json.stepName} | sort Value desc

29.title: 💎 Customer Lifetime Value
29.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | summarize Value = avg(additionalfields.customerLifetimeValue), P90 = percentile(additionalfields.customerLifetimeValue, 90), Events = count(), by: {json.stepName} | sort Value desc

30.title: 📑 Contract Value
30.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | summarize Value = avg(additionalfields.contractValue), Events = count(), by: {json.stepName} | sort Value desc

31.title: 📈 Annual Revenue
31.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | summarize Value = avg(additionalfields.annualRevenue), Events = count(), by: {json.stepName} | sort Value desc

32.title: ⏱️ Processing Time
32.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | summarize Value = avg(additionalfields.processingTime), P90 = percentile(additionalfields.processingTime, 90), Events = count(), by: {json.stepName} | sort Value desc

33.title: 📅 Seasonal Impact
33.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | summarize Value = avg(additionalfields.seasonalImpact), Events = count(), by: {json.stepName} | sort Value desc

34.title: 📊 Market Share
34.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | summarize Value = avg(additionalfields.marketShare), Events = count(), by: {json.stepName} | sort Value desc

35.title: 📄 Page Views
35.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | summarize Value = avg(additionalfields.pageViews), Events = count(), by: {json.stepName} | sort Value desc

36.title: ⚙️ Efficiency Rating
36.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | summarize Value = avg(additionalfields.efficiencyRating), Events = count(), by: {json.stepName} | sort Value desc

37.title: 📊 Resource Utilization
37.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | summarize Value = avg(additionalfields.resourceUtilization), Events = count(), by: {json.stepName} | sort Value desc

38.title: 🔄 Purchase Frequency
38.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | summarize Value = avg(additionalfields.purchaseFrequency), Events = count(), by: {json.stepName} | sort Value desc

39.title: 💲 Product Price
39.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | summarize Value = avg(additionalfields.Price), Events = count(), by: {json.stepName} | sort Value desc

40.title: 🏷️ Discount Applied
40.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | summarize Value = avg(additionalfields.discountApplied), Events = count(), by: {json.stepName} | sort Value desc

41.title: 🧾 Tax Amount
41.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | summarize Value = sum(additionalfields.taxAmount), Events = count(), by: {json.stepName} | sort Value desc

42.title: 📦 Shipping Cost
42.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | summarize Value = avg(additionalfields.shippingCost), Events = count(), by: {json.stepName} | sort Value desc

43.title: 💸 Acquisition Cost
43.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | summarize Value = avg(additionalfields.acquisitionCost), Events = count(), by: {json.stepName} | sort Value desc

44.title: 📈 Upsell Potential
44.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | summarize Value = avg(additionalfields.upsellPotential), Events = count(), by: {json.stepName} | sort Value desc

45.title: 💸 Cost per Acquisition
45.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | summarize Value = avg(additionalfields.costPerAcquisition), Events = count(), by: {json.stepName} | sort Value desc

46.title: 🌱 Growth Potential
46.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | summarize Value = avg(additionalfields.growthPotential), Events = count(), by: {json.stepName} | sort Value desc

47.title: 🔮 Future Value
47.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | summarize Value = avg(additionalfields.futureValue), Events = count(), by: {json.stepName} | sort Value desc

48.title: 🔬 🎯 Conversion Probability vs 💵 Avg Order Value Correlation
48.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | filter isNotNull(additionalfields.conversionProbability) AND isNotNull(additionalfields.averageOrderValue) | fields x = additionalfields.conversionProbability, y = additionalfields.averageOrderValue, step = json.stepName | limit 500

49.title: 📈 💵 Avg Order Value Trend Over Time
49.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | makeTimeseries revenue = avg(additionalfields.averageOrderValue), volume = count(), bins:30

51.title: 📍 Location
51.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | filter isNotNull(additionalfields.location) | summarize Count = count(), by: {additionalfields.location} | sort Count desc

53.title: 🚪 Abandonment Risk
53.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | filter isNotNull(additionalfields.abandonmentRisk) | summarize Count = count(), by: {additionalfields.abandonmentRisk} | sort Count desc

54.title: 🔄 Cross-Sell Opportunity
54.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | filter isNotNull(additionalfields.crossSellOpportunity) | summarize Count = count(), by: {additionalfields.crossSellOpportunity} | sort Count desc

55.title: 📱 Device Type
55.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | filter isNotNull(additionalfields.deviceType) | summarize Count = count(), by: {additionalfields.deviceType} | sort Count desc

56.title: 🔒 Security Rating
56.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | filter isNotNull(additionalfields.securityRating) | summarize Count = count(), by: {additionalfields.securityRating} | sort Count desc

57.title: ⚠️ Churn Risk
57.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | filter isNotNull(additionalfields.churnRisk) | summarize Count = count(), by: {additionalfields.churnRisk} | sort Count desc

58.title: 🌐 Browser
58.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | filter isNotNull(additionalfields.browser) | summarize Count = count(), by: {additionalfields.browser} | sort Count desc

59.title: 📡 Entry Channel
59.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | filter isNotNull(additionalfields.entryChannel) | summarize Count = count(), by: {additionalfields.entryChannel} | sort Count desc

60.title: ⚠️ Risk Level
60.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | filter isNotNull(additionalfields.riskLevel) | summarize Count = count(), by: {additionalfields.riskLevel} | sort Count desc

61.title: 🛡️ Fraud Risk
61.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | filter isNotNull(additionalfields.fraudRisk) | summarize Count = count(), by: {additionalfields.fraudRisk} | sort Count desc

62.title: 📦 Product Name
62.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | filter isNotNull(additionalfields.Productname) | summarize Count = count(), by: {additionalfields.Productname} | sort Count desc

63.title: 🏷️ Product ID (SKU)
63.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | filter isNotNull(additionalfields.ProductId) | summarize Count = count(), by: {additionalfields.ProductId} | sort Count desc

64.title: 📂 Product Type
64.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | filter isNotNull(additionalfields.ProductType) | summarize Count = count(), by: {additionalfields.ProductType} | sort Count desc

66.title: ⚡ Step Performance
66.query:
fetch bizevents 
| filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" 
| filter json.companyName == $CompanyName 
| filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType 
| summarize Events = count(), AvgTime = avg(additionalfields.processingTime), ErrorRate = round((toDouble(countIf(additionalfields.hasError == true)) / toDouble(count())) * 100, decimals:2), by: {json.stepName} 
| sort Events desc

67.title: 📋 SLA Compliance (< 5s)
67.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType | summarize TotalEvents = count(), WithinSLA = countIf(additionalfields.processingTime < 5000), by: {json.stepName} | fieldsAdd ComplianceRate = (WithinSLA / TotalEvents) * 100

68.title: 🕐 Hourly Activity Pattern
68.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType | fieldsAdd hour = toString(getHour(timestamp)) | summarize Events = count(), by: {hour} | sort hour asc

69.title: 📊 SLA Target Compliance
69.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | summarize total = count(), within_sla = countIf(isNull(additionalfields.hasError) or additionalfields.hasError == false) | fieldsAdd sla_rate = round((toDouble(within_sla) / toDouble(total)) * 100, decimals:1)

71.title: 📉 Error Rate Trend
71.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType | makeTimeseries {errors = countIf(additionalfields.hasError == true), total = count()}, bins:30 | fieldsAdd ErrorRate = (errors[] / total[]) * 100

72.title: ❌ Errors by Step
72.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType | filter additionalfields.hasError == true | summarize ErrorCount = count(), by: {json.stepName} | sort ErrorCount desc

73.title: 🐛 Error Details
73.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType | filter additionalfields.hasError == true | summarize Occurrences = count(), by: {json.stepName, additionalfields.errorMessage} | sort Occurrences desc | limit 20

75.title: Requests
75.query:
timeseries requests = sum(dt.service.request.count),
           by:{dt.entity.service}
           | fields  timeframe, 
          interval, 
          service = entityName(dt.entity.service),
          requests
| sort arraySum(requests) desc
| filter in(service, $Service)
| limit 100

76.title: Requests - Success vs Failed
76.query:
timeseries total = sum(dt.service.request.count, default:0),
           failed = sum(dt.service.request.failure_count,default:0),
           nonempty: true, 
           filter: in(dt.smartscape.service, array($Service)) 
| fieldsAdd success = total[] -failed[]
| fields timeframe,
         interval,
         success,
         failed

77.title: Requests - Key Requests
77.query:
timeseries requests = sum(dt.service.request.count),
           by:{endpoint.name},
           filter: endpoint.name != "NON_KEY_REQUESTS" and
           in(dt.entity.service, array($Service))
| fields  timeframe, 
          interval, 
          endpoint.name,
          requests
| sort arraySum(requests) desc         
| limit 100

79.title: Failed Requests
79.query:
timeseries errors = sum(dt.service.request.failure_count,default:0),
           nonempty: true,
           by:{dt.entity.service}
           | fields  timeframe, 
          interval, 
          service = entityName(dt.entity.service),
          errors
| sort arraySum(errors) desc
| filter in(service, $Service)
| limit 100

80.title: 5xx Errors
80.query:
timeseries errors = sum(dt.service.request.count,default:0),
           nonempty: true,
           by:{dt.entity.service},
           filter:
           http.response.status_code >= 500 and http.response.status_code <= 599 
| fields  timeframe, 
          interval, 
          service = lower(entityName(dt.entity.service)),
          errors
| sort arraySum(errors) desc
| filter in(service, array($Service))
| limit 100

81.title: 4xx Errors
81.query:
timeseries errors = sum(dt.service.request.count,default:0),
           nonempty: true,
           by:{dt.entity.service},
           filter:
           http.response.status_code >= 400 and http.response.status_code <= 499
| fields  timeframe, 
          interval, 
          service = lower(entityName(dt.entity.service)),
          errors
|filter in(service, array($Service))
| sort arraySum(errors) desc
| limit 100

83.title: Latency_p50
83.query:
timeseries latency_p50 = median(dt.service.request.response_time),
           by:{dt.entity.service}
           | fields  timeframe, 
          interval, 
          service = entityName(dt.entity.service),
          latency_p50
| sort arrayAvg(latency_p50) desc
| filter in(service, $Service)
| limit 100

84.title: Latency_p90
84.query:
timeseries latency_p90 = percentile(dt.service.request.response_time, 90),
           by:{dt.entity.service}
          | fields  timeframe, 
          interval, 
          service = lower(entityName(dt.entity.service)),
          latency_p90
| sort arrayAvg(latency_p90) desc
| filter in(service, $Service)
| limit 100

85.title: Latency_p99
85.query:
timeseries latency_p99 = percentile(dt.service.request.response_time, 99), 
           by:{dt.entity.service}
| fields  timeframe, 
          interval, 
          service = lower(entityName(dt.entity.service)),
          latency_p99
| sort arrayAvg(latency_p99) desc
| filter in(service, array($Service))
| limit 100

87.title: 💥 TRACES WITH EXCEPTIONS: Click on Endpoint to open Trace. Or use Open-With Dynatrace Intelligence CoPilot to explain Exception
87.query:
fetch spans
| fieldsAdd serviceName = entityName(dt.entity.service)
| filter in(serviceName, array($Service))

| fieldsAdd exception.stacktrace = span.events[][exception.stack_trace]
| fieldsAdd exception.class = span.events[1][exception.type]
| fieldsAdd eventname = span.events[1][span_event.name]
| fieldsAdd exception.message = toString(span.events[1][exception.message])
| fieldsAdd trace_id = toString(trace.id), span_id = toString(span.id)

| filter eventname == "exception"
| filter isNotNull(span.exit_by_exception_id)

| lookup [fetch dt.entity.service | fields id, entity.name], sourceField:dt.entity.service, lookupField:id, prefix:"svc."
| fieldsAdd Service = svc.entity.name

| fields Time = start_time,
         start_time,
         end_time,
         Service,
         Endpoint = concat("[", if(isnull(endpoint.name), span.name, else: endpoint.name), "](/ui/apps/dynatrace.distributedtracing/explorer?cv=a%2Cfalse\u0026sidebar=a%2Cfalse\u0026filter=dt.entity.service+%3D+",dt.entity.service,"+AND+endpoint.name+%3D+",endpoint.name,"+AND+trace.id+%3D+",
                         trace_id,"\u0026traceId=",trace_id,"\u0026spanId=",span_id,"\u0026tf=",$dt_timeframe_from,";",$dt_timeframe_to,"\u0026pb=true","\u0026tt=",encodeUrl(toString(start_time)),")"),
         ExceptionClass = if(isNotNull(exception.class),exception.class, else:"N/A"),
         ExceptionMesssage = concat("🤖 ", if(isNotNull(exception.message),exception.message, else:"N/A")),
         Exception = if(isNotNull(exception.stacktrace),exception.stacktrace, else:"N/A"),
         Duration = duration,
         dt.entity.service, 
         trace.id,
         span.id     
| sort start_time desc
| limit 200
| fieldsAdd prompt=concat("Analyze the Exception, Service and Endpoint and tell me how to fix the exception ", `ExceptionClass`, ":", ExceptionMesssage), execute=true, contexts=array(record(type="supplementary", value=substring(concat(`Exception`, " Service", `Endpoint`), to:20000)))

88.title: 💥 Top Exceptions
88.query:
fetch dt.davis.events, from:now()-24h
| filter event.kind == "ERROR_EVENT"
| summarize occurrences = count(), lastSeen = takeLast(timestamp), by: {event.name, dt.entity.service}
| fieldsAdd serviceName = entityName(dt.entity.service)
| sort occurrences desc
| limit 15

89.title: 🚨 Active Dynatrace Intelligence Problems
89.query:
fetch dt.davis.problems
| filter event.status == "ACTIVE"
| fields display_id, title, affected_entity_ids, event.start, event.status, management_zone
| sort event.start desc
| limit 10

90.title: 📋 Recent Log Errors
90.query:
fetch logs, from:now()-1h
| filter loglevel == "ERROR" or loglevel == "WARN"
| fields timestamp, loglevel, content, dt.entity.service
| fieldsAdd serviceName = entityName(dt.entity.service)
| sort timestamp desc
| limit 20

92.title: 🕐 Hourly Activity Pattern
92.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter json.journeyType == $JourneyType | fieldsAdd hour = toString(getHour(timestamp)) | summarize Events = count(), by: {hour} | sort hour asc

93.title: 📊 Event Volume Distribution
93.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | summarize count = count(), by: {json.stepName} | sort count desc

94.title: ⏱️ Processing Time Trend
94.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | makeTimeseries avg_processing = avg(additionalfields.processingTime), p90_processing = percentile(additionalfields.processingTime, 90), bins:30

95.title: 📉 Success vs Failure Trend
95.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | makeTimeseries success = countIf(json.journeyStatus == "Success"), failed = countIf(json.journeyStatus == "Failed"), bins:30

96.title: 📐 Processing Time Range (Min / Avg / Max)
96.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | makeTimeseries min_time = min(additionalfields.processingTime), avg_time = avg(additionalfields.processingTime), max_time = max(additionalfields.processingTime), bins:30

97.title: 📊 Processing Time Distribution
97.query: fetch bizevents | filter event.kind == "BIZ_EVENT" | filter json.companyName == $CompanyName | filter in(json.journeyType, $JourneyType) | filter isNotNull(additionalfields.processingTime) | fields processingTime = additionalfields.processingTime

98.content:
---
🤖 *Dashboard generated by Hybrid AI (10 sections, proven DQL) | 2026-05-08 | 98 tiles*
